since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.95%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.67% · Gold +1.77% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.95%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.95%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.76%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.76%, PLTR +3.19%, CHKP +2.75%, AMAT +2.69%, KLAC +2.23%. Laggards: BIDU -3.45%, PUBM -2.68%, CRNC -1.47%, DELL -1.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.05% at $159.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
